item.title: LFOT METAR/TAF
item.description:
🟢 METAR LFOT 091800Z AUTO 08004KT CAVOK 21/14 Q1010 NOSIG
🟡 TAF LFOT 091700Z 0918/1018 VRB05KT CAVOK TEMPO 0922/1005 -SHRA SCT060CB PROB30 TEMPO 1001/1005 3500 TSRA SCT050CB PROB40 TEMPO 1009/1013 18010KT 4000 SHRA BKN030CB PROB40 TEMPO 1014/1018 VRB10G25KT 2000 TSRA BKN020CB
